_meta.description: Sponsored Brands negative keywords (ad-group-level). Daily snapshot — every fire upserts the full current set. Sourced via Ads-API v3.1 paginated POST /sb/negativeKeywords/list. Separate from SP — different keyword_id namespace, different Amazon endpoint family. SB has no separate campaign-level negative keywords endpoint as of v3.1.
_meta.retention_note: rows older than 2 days are pruned nightly (newest snapshot per store never pruned where applicable); query beyond the window returns a report_date_note

columns.note: Marketplace this ads row belongs to. Query ads data per (store, country_code) directly — no need to reverse-map profile_id.

columns.comment: Marketplace-local date the snapshot was captured.
Server-side timestamp the row was UPSERTed.
Amazon's SB keyword identifier — distinct namespace from SP.
Campaign id this negative scopes to.
Ad group id this negative scopes to.
Any Amazon response fields not promoted to a typed column.
columns.note: Documented opt-outs (2026-07-11): nativeLanguageKeyword / nativeLanguageLocale — localization metadata on a handful of rows, deliberately not promoted.
